title: La balandra Isabel llegó esta tarde
writer: Carlos Hugo Christensen, Guillermo Meneses, Aquiles Nazoa
actors: Arturo de Córdova, Virginia Luque, América Barrio
plot: A Captain with a mistress at another port leaves his wife on a routine trip with his son. There, after making a hasty retreat from his mistress, she, with the help of a local shaman, conspire to take him away from his family forever.
